source_pr.title: ddl: Coalesce partition | tidb-test=pr/2111
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #15002

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Test changes include additional `UNION ... ORDER BY` assertions in `ddl/db_partition_test.go`, but no concrete flaky failure signature is captured.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky failure signature captured (DDL partition change PR)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily implements/adjusts DDL partition behavior (coalesce/add hash/key partition) and updates tests with extra assertions. The case does not include a concrete flaky failure signature or an explicit stabilization-only change (e.g., synchronization, retries, cleanup, timeout tuning) tied to a specific flaky symptom. Keep as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Feature/bugfix PR with test changes but without a clear flaky failure signature or targeted stabilization mechanism; keep as insufficient evidence.

evidence: files: ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, ddl/partition.go, parser/ast/ddl.go, table/tables/partition.go, table/tables/partition_test.go
